title: After the Takarazuka Kinen: Double-Slay ★ Runaway!

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waheeey!
Let's gooooo! ☆★☆★☆彡

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Let's pick up the pace, bestie! I got a need for
speed!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You got it, sis! Time to leave the rest behind and
go oooff!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We own this track!
Let's gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Ooohhhhh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A shock runs through the stands. Front runners
usually take the lead and set the pace for the
race, but they don't seem to want to do things
the usual way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's their double-slay runaway. The two of them
take the lead and push each other to maintain a
breakneck sprint the whole way through. And
then...

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What was that?! It's like I'm absolutely fried, but still kinda hyped. We were wildin' out there, weren't we?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? That was cray cray! Let's keep the
vibes high and claw our names all over the G1s! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer and Daitaku Helios sprawl out on
the grass side by side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A strong wind blows freely in the sky. Mejiro
Palmer has finally done it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What was that run? That was so incredibly reckless.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But at the same time... I've never seen her scarier.
I think that's the best Palmer's ever been.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can't argue with that. But she caused such a
commotion both before and during the race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I wonder what Grandmother will say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Grandmother? She isn't here to watch us today,
remember?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It seems she flew back just in time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: See? She's right there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: T-T-Trainer! Th-th-th-th-that's! It's!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There in the front row stands a certain imposing
old woman we didn't expect to see today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wh-why is Grandmother here?! Trainer! You said
she wasn't coming!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You'd better be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing to do about it at this stage.
What's done is done. Mejiro Palmer's expression
looks strained, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
W-well, it's too late now, right? Not like I can
pretend it didn't happen, so I might as well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yo, Grandmama! ☆ Waheeey...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her greeting has about as much force as a
mosquito's buzz. In response...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sh-she's mad, isn't she? Or maybe it's just the
light?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wait... did she just—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grandmother Mejiro doesn't respond directly but,
from a distance...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I feel like I see the corners of her mouth turn up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Aghhh! That took literal years off my life, I swear!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But y'know... We really did it! We killed it today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's pulled this off, there's nothing left
to be afraid of. She can go anywhere from here.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
What race do you wanna go for next, Palmster?
Let's coordinate our schedules!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You mean you'll run with me again?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Will I? I feel like we've gotta run everything together now!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: So tell us, Tray-Tray! Where's the next party?
choice_data_list: Why don't we take another shot at a big one?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, she partied the way she couldn't back at
the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But only when she can run as freely as she did
today, as her true self, even in prestigious races,
will we really be able to say she's free.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: "Another" shot? You don't mean...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: No, you do. The autumn Tenno Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's a lotta pressure. There's a good chance
things'll end up the way they did in spring...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, they won't! Like I'd let that happen! ☆ I'll
be right there next to you, so don't you dare
worry about a thing!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
If we're together, nothing's gonna stop us! We're
goin' all the way, girl! ★ Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: That's right! If you're there with me, I can do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their bond is unwavering. No matter how
illustrious the race, together, they're unafraid.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can cut loose at the prestigious autumn
Tenno Sho and show everyone how much she's
grown since the spring.
